nodes.name: Google Drive - New Doc Batch Trigger

parameters.name: parsing_instruction
parameters.value: This is a legal due diligence document. Extract all text verbatim including: party names, dates, dollar amounts, defined terms, covenants, warranties, representations, indemnities, termination clauses, IP assignments, employment obligations, and any schedules or exhibits. Preserve all section numbering and headings.

parameters.body:
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-3-5-sonnet-20241022', max_tokens: 3000, temperature: 0.1, system: 'You are a senior M&A lawyer and due diligence specialist with expertise across corporate law, IP, employment, finance, and real estate. Analyse legal documents with precision. Flag every risk — do not downplay issues. Return only valid JSON.', messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'Perform due diligence analysis on this document.

DOCUMENT NAME: ' + $('Extract DD Session Metadata').item.json.cleanDocName + '
MATTER ID: ' + $('Extract DD Session Metadata').item.json.matterId + '

DOCUMENT TEXT (first 12000 chars):
' + ($json.markdown || $json.text || JSON.stringify($json)).substring(0, 12000) + '

Return ONLY this JSON:
{
  "documentType": "SPA|SHA|Employment Agreement|IP Assignment|NDA|Lease|Loan Agreement|Financial Statement|Corporate Record|Property Title|Other",
  "documentSummary": "2-sentence plain English summary",
  "partiesIdentified": [{"name": "...", "role": "Buyer|Seller|Guarantor|Lender|Borrower|Other"}],
  "keyDates": [{"description": "...", "date": "YYYY-MM-DD or as stated"}],
  "keyFinancialTerms": [{"description": "...", "amount": "...", "currency": "..."}],
  "redFlags": [{"severity": "CRITICAL|HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW", "clause": "clause reference or section", "issue": "what the concern is", "recommendation": "what to do about it"}],
  "missingProvisions": ["standard clauses that should be present but are absent"],
  "favourableTerms": ["terms that benefit the acquiring/advising party"],
  "ipConsiderations": "key IP issues or assignments identified — or None",
  "employmentObligations": "key employment-related obligations — or None",
  "regulatoryIssues": "any regulatory compliance concerns — or None",
  "overallRiskRating": "CRITICAL|HIGH|MEDIUM|LOW",
  "riskRatingSummary": "1-sentence explanation of overall risk rating",
  "immediateActions": ["actions needed before proceeding with transaction"]
}' }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'text-embedding-3-small', input: $json.documentType + ': ' + $json.documentSummary + '. Risk: ' + $json.overallRiskRating + '. Issues: ' + ($json.redFlags || []).map(f => f.issue).join('. ') }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ vectors: [{ id: $('Parse Document Analysis').item.json.fileId, values: $json.data[0].embedding, metadata: { matterId: $('Parse Document Analysis').item.json.matterId, documentType: $('Parse Document Analysis').item.json.documentType, documentSummary: $('Parse Document Analysis').item.json.documentSummary, overallRiskRating: $('Parse Document Analysis').item.json.overallRiskRating, totalFlagCount: $('Parse Document Analysis').item.json.totalFlagCount, criticalFlagCount: $('Parse Document Analysis').item.json.criticalFlagCount, fileName: $('Parse Document Analysis').item.json.fileName } }], namespace: 'due-diligence' }) }}

parameters.text:
={{ ':rotating_light: *CRITICAL RISK FLAG — IMMEDIATE REVIEW REQUIRED*

*Matter ID:* ' + $('Parse Document Analysis').item.json.matterId + '
*Document:* ' + $('Parse Document Analysis').item.json.cleanDocName + '
*Document Type:* ' + $('Parse Document Analysis').item.json.documentType + '
*Overall Risk:* ' + $('Parse Document Analysis').item.json.overallRiskRating + '

:red_circle: *CRITICAL FLAGS (' + $('Parse Document Analysis').item.json.criticalFlagCount + '):*
' + ($('Parse Document Analysis').item.json.redFlags || []).filter(f => f.severity === 'CRITICAL').map(f => '• [' + f.clause + ']: ' + f.issue + '
  → ' + f.recommendation).join('
') + '

:orange_circle: *HIGH FLAGS (' + $('Parse Document Analysis').item.json.highFlagCount + '):*
' + ($('Parse Document Analysis').item.json.redFlags || []).filter(f => f.severity === 'HIGH').slice(0, 3).map(f => '• ' + f.issue).join('
') + '

*Immediate Actions:*
' + ($('Parse Document Analysis').item.json.immediateActions || []).map(a => '• ' + a).join('
') }}

nodes.name: Google Docs - Create Document Analysis Report

parameters.title: ={{ $('Parse Document Analysis').item.json.matterId + ' — ' + $('Parse Document Analysis').item.json.cleanDocName + ' — DD Analysis' }}
parameters.content:
={{ '# DUE DILIGENCE DOCUMENT ANALYSIS

**Matter ID:** ' + $('Parse Document Analysis').item.json.matterId + '
**Document:** ' + $('Parse Document Analysis').item.json.cleanDocName + '
**Document Type:** ' + $('Parse Document Analysis').item.json.documentType + '
**Processed:** ' + $('Parse Document Analysis').item.json.processedAt + '
**Overall Risk Rating:** ' + $('Parse Document Analysis').item.json.overallRiskRating + '

---

## Document Summary

' + $('Parse Document Analysis').item.json.documentSummary + '

*' + $('Parse Document Analysis').item.json.riskRatingSummary + '*

---

## Parties Identified

' + ($('Parse Document Analysis').item.json.partiesIdentified || []).map(p => '- **' + p.name + '** (' + p.role + ')').join('
') + '

---

## Key Financial Terms

' + ($('Parse Document Analysis').item.json.keyFinancialTerms || []).map(f => '- ' + f.description + ': ' + f.currency + ' ' + f.amount).join('
') + '

---

## Key Dates

' + ($('Parse Document Analysis').item.json.keyDates || []).map(d => '- ' + d.description + ': ' + d.date).join('
') + '

---

## RED FLAGS (' + $('Parse Document Analysis').item.json.totalFlagCount + ' total)

' + ($('Parse Document Analysis').item.json.redFlags || []).map(f => '### [' + f.severity + '] — Clause: ' + f.clause + '
**Issue:** ' + f.issue + '
**Recommendation:** ' + f.recommendation).join('

') + '

---

## Missing Provisions

' + ($('Parse Document Analysis').item.json.missingProvisions || []).map(m => '- ' + m).join('
') + '

---

## Favourable Terms

' + ($('Parse Document Analysis').item.json.favourableTerms || []).map(f => '- ' + f).join('
') + '

---

## Specialist Notes

**IP Considerations:** ' + $('Parse Document Analysis').item.json.ipConsiderations + '

**Employment Obligations:** ' + $('Parse Document Analysis').item.json.employmentObligations + '

**Regulatory Issues:** ' + $('Parse Document Analysis').item.json.regulatoryIssues + '

---

## Immediate Actions Required

' + ($('Parse Document Analysis').item.json.immediateActions || []).map((a, i) => (i+1) + '. ' + a).join('
') + '

---

*Generated by AI Due Diligence System — Must be reviewed by qualified legal counsel before reliance*' }}

parameters.text:
={{ (':white_check_mark: *Document Analysed — ' + $('Parse Document Analysis').item.json.overallRiskRating + ' RISK*

*Matter ID:* ' + $('Parse Document Analysis').item.json.matterId + '
*Document:* ' + $('Parse Document Analysis').item.json.cleanDocName + '
*Type:* ' + $('Parse Document Analysis').item.json.documentType + '

*Risk Flags:* ' + $('Parse Document Analysis').item.json.criticalFlagCount + ' CRITICAL | ' + $('Parse Document Analysis').item.json.highFlagCount + ' HIGH | ' + $('Parse Document Analysis').item.json.totalFlagCount + ' total

*Summary:* ' + $('Parse Document Analysis').item.json.documentSummary + '

_Google Doc analysis report created._
_Stored in Pinecone for matter-level RAG queries._') }}

main.node: Google Docs - Create Document Analysis Report
Google Docs - Create Document Analysis Report
